span.p: Health band observed or just changed

span.p:
In a calendar dead zone
or testing window?

span.p:
SUPPRESS — no action
re-evaluate at window end

span.p:
MAINTAIN + consider advocacy / expansion
(gate first; never bottom-quartile)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
MAINTAIN cadence
weekly pulse / monthly sync

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Last sync stale OR
row-count cliff unexplained?

span.p:
ROSTERING PRE-FLIGHT first
do NOT call the band real yet

span.p:
AUDIT the score
learning-analytics-analyst, not a play
